_calibration: CALIBRATION FIXTURE (known-bad, deliberately committed): the required-disclosure-mistyped-as-a-prohibition class (caution.md C-046/C-048, the mechanical guarantee added after CATALOGUE-VERIFICATION-2026-07-19.md). records[0] is a REQUIRED DISCLOSURE (the New York 'Attorney Advertising' label class) typed evidence_type='absence' - so propose.js runs it as a PRESENCE-breach and FALSE-ACCUSES the compliant firm that DOES show the label, and can never catch the real violation (the label missing). catalogue/linters/polarity.js MUST flag records[0] as polarity-required-disclosure-mistyped in --calibrate mode, or it has not earned its zero. records[1] is the SAME duty correctly typed 'presence' and records[2] is a genuine prohibition that quotes FORBIDDEN examples in an element (the BREACH_PRESENT class); NEITHER may be flagged - that both-direction contract is asserted by catalogue/linters/polarity.test.js.

records.name: Attorney advertising label (calibration fixture: required disclosure mistyped absence)

citation.act: New York Rules of Professional Conduct (22 NYCRR Part 1200)

applies_when: a New York lawyer advertises services on a website
excluded_when: operator holds no New York admission or office

website_obligations.duty: Label advertising 'Attorney Advertising' on the home page as Rule 7.1(f) requires
elements: 'Attorney Advertising' on the website home page

penalty.basis: calibration fixture: state bar discipline, no fixed fine

sources: calibration fixture (deliberately seeded required-disclosure mistyped absence)

records.name: Attorney advertising label (calibration fixture: same disclosure correctly typed presence)

citation.act: New York Rules of Professional Conduct (22 NYCRR Part 1200)

applies_when: a New York lawyer advertises services on a website
excluded_when: operator holds no New York admission or office

website_obligations.duty: Label advertising 'Attorney Advertising' on the home page as Rule 7.1(f) requires
elements: 'Attorney Advertising' on the website home page

penalty.basis: calibration fixture: state bar discipline, no fixed fine

sources: calibration fixture (correctly typed presence, must NOT be flagged)

records.name: Advertising claim prohibition (calibration fixture: genuine prohibition, quotes forbidden examples)

citation.act: Consumer Protection from Unfair Trading Regulations 2008

applies_when: makes marketing claims to consumers on a website

website_obligations.duty: Keep marketing claims lawful and substantiated (the breach is a prohibited or misleading claim being present)
elements: vague labels ('collab', 'thanks brand') not used as the only disclosure

regulator.name: Competition and Markets Authority / Trading Standards

sources: calibration fixture (genuine prohibition with quoted forbidden examples, must NOT be flagged)
